note: Strategic goals steer the Opportunity Engine (growth-impl.md §9). Each goal binds to a metric the loop tracks, plus optional topics/locales/countries (countries match audience-country signals like country:CN). Human-set quarterly. 2026-07-18: cn-market broadened to cjk-market per user direction — the H2 objective is attracting more CJK users (CN/TW/HK/JP/KR), measured by CJK-AUDIENCE conversions (events.byAudience), not page-locale ones.
